name: Template - Monitor Azure & M365 Updates - Breaking Changes

parameters.content:
## Monitor Azure & M365 Updates - Breaking Changes

Runs every Wednesday at 9 AM.

**Flow:** Schedule -> Azure Updates RSS Feed -> Filter by keywords -> Teams notification

**Setup:**
1. Set `TEAMS_WEBHOOK_URL` environment variable in n8n
2. Activate the workflow
3. First run will set the baseline date

**Keywords monitored:** breaking, deprecation, retirement, migration required, action required, end of support, preview, general availability, entra, conditional access, intune, defender, key vault, managed identity, graph api, powershell
